monstera_deliciosa.name: Monstera Deliciosa
monstera_deliciosa.description: Popular tropical plant with iconic split leaves. Loves humidity.

ficus_lyrata.name: Ficus Lyrata (Fiddle Leaf Fig)
ficus_lyrata.description: Trendy indoor tree with large, violin-shaped leaves.

sansevieria_trifasciata.name: Snake Plant (Sansevieria)
sansevieria_trifasciata.description: Hardy succulent that tolerates neglect and low light.

aloe_vera.name: Aloe Vera
aloe_vera.description: Medicinal succulent that stores water in its leaves.

epipremnum_aureum.name: Pothos
epipremnum_aureum.description: Fast-growing vine with heart-shaped leaves. Very easy to care for.

zamioculcas_zamiifolia.name: ZZ Plant
zamioculcas_zamiifolia.description: Ultra-tough plant with shiny, dark green leaves.

spathiphyllum.name: Peace Lily
spathiphyllum.description: Elegant plant that wilts dramatically when thirsty.

chlorophytum_comosum.name: Spider Plant
chlorophytum_comosum.description: Produces many 'babies' on long stalks. Great for beginners.

plectranthus_amboinicus.name: Rýmovník (Mexican Mint)
plectranthus_amboinicus.description: Fragrant medicinal plant with thick, fuzzy leaves. Good for tea and colds.

kalanchoe_blossfeldiana.name: Kolopejka vděčná (Flaming Katy)
kalanchoe_blossfeldiana.description: Popular flowering succulent with long-lasting colorful blooms.
